templates.title: AI Gateway
templates.description: SSE streaming pipeline (webhook -> upstream SSE -> streaming response)

templates.title: REST API Service
templates.description: REST API with JSON transform, echo, and health check

templates.title: REST CRUD API (VilORM + SQLite)
templates.description: Task CRUD API with VilORM, VilQuery builder, SQLite. Demonstrates: VilEntity derive, q().select() projection, q().insert(), q().update().set_optional(), find_by_id(), delete(), scalar()

templates.title: WebSocket Chat
templates.description: Real-time WebSocket chat with broadcast hub

templates.title: IoT Gateway
templates.description: MQTT device gateway with telemetry processing

templates.title: Multi-Model Router
templates.description: Route requests to different AI model providers

templates.title: WASM FaaS
templates.description: WebAssembly functions with pre-warmed instance pool

templates.title: AI Agent
templates.description: ReAct agent with tool calling for IT operations

templates.title: Observer Dashboard Demo
templates.description: VilApp with embedded observer dashboard, SLO budget, and alerting

templates.title: Pipeline Sse Standard Dialect
templates.description: IoT Sensor Dashboard (Pipeline SSE Standard Dialect)

templates.title: VilORM Blog Platform
templates.description: Complete VilORM showcase: VilEntity, VilQuery JOIN, on_conflict_nothing, set_optional partial update, scalar aggregates, column projection (no SELECT *)

templates.title: VilORM E-Commerce
templates.description: E-commerce with VilORM: Products + Orders + Items. Demonstrates: LEFT JOIN + GROUP BY, atomic stock decrement (set_expr), scalar SUM aggregate, delete_where cascade, value_opt_str for nullable fields

templates.title: VilORM Multi-Tenant SaaS
templates.description: Multi-tenant SaaS with VilORM: Tenants, Users, Settings. Demonstrates: ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE (upsert), on_conflict_nothing (idempotent), set_optional + set_optional_i64, scoped where_eq, scalar COUNT

templates.title: VilORM Event Analytics
templates.description: Analytics dashboard with VilORM: Events + Daily Aggregates. Demonstrates: GROUP BY + HAVING, COUNT DISTINCT scalar, time-series ORDER BY, where_raw datetime filter, do_update_raw counter increment
